heading: Enlistment of members engaged in schooling
label: 3714 Enlistment of members engaged in schooling
text: The initial period of active duty for training required by , may be divided into two successive annual periods of not less than six weeks each, to permit the enlistment of a Reserve member without interrupting any full-time schooling in which the member is engaged.section 12103(d) of title 10
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the complete revision of former chapter 21 of this title by .section 765 of this titlePub. L. 96–322
